headline: 2 Reasons to Like URI and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for United Rentals. The stock has dropped 25.9% and now trades at $732.09, rattling many shareholders. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
